files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index af6c361..44e3766 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -409,2 +409,7 @@ Day 434 / Week 62 observations:
 - Remaining base is all S2 C. At this scale, fixed support and capacity costs matter more than preserving a cohort that is already running off.
 - Week 62 adjustment: keep all plans on model tier 1, reduce quotas to A=500/B=1k/C=1k, move capacity to tier 1, set ops/dev/ad spend to $0, and keep promotions off.
+
+Day 441 / Week 63 observations:
+- Cash is $1.617M. Subscribers fell to 127 and usage collapsed to 2.2k/week.
+- Remaining base is all S2 C. With no acquisition and tiny usage, the optimal posture is minimum fixed cost and no discretionary spend.
+- Week 63 adjustment: move capacity to tier 0, keep all model tiers at 1, reduce quotas to A=100/B=250/C=250, keep ops/dev/ad spend at $0, and leave promotions off.
